global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design promoting a food delivery service.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears abstract or decorative, possibly representing food or delivery.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo text that reads 'PlateSprint', positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: Another central graphic element that is abstract, possibly related to food or delivery.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that is abstract, complementing the overall theme of the ad.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small graphic element located at the bottom center, possibly representing a button or icon.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15', prominently displayed in a bold font.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: The logo of PlateSprint, displayed prominently at the top with a clear and modern design.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like text that says 'Get offer', positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small text badge that reads 'SALE', positioned at the top right corner of the ad.
